title: Head of Tech > Global Head of Design AI & Technology
headline: Head of Technology > Global Head of Design Technology
text:
Three years ago, I joined Benoy to start building our Design Technology capability. 

BIM, computation, sustainability tech, automation, custom plugins - we weren't great at this. Now we are. Our Design Technology team makes sure of that every day. Our teams now reach for these tools like they reach for a pen. 

That's always been the goal - technology so ubiquitous, so integrated, that it stops feeling like technology. 

Over the last year, we've been watching another seismic shift - AI now touches how we think, design, deliver and compete. Roles like this don't come around because the business is interested in AI, they come around when we start demonstrating value and someone needs to take responsibility for making this technology land in practice - the adoption, successes, failures, scaling, building and rebuilding. 

I think firms that are getting it wrong are optimising for the technology. I believe the ones getting it right are optimising for the profession. You need to understand what's at stake in a design review, a planning submission, a coordination call, a client pitch to understand what to build, how to scale and how to solve real problems for your teams. 

I'm stepping into the role of Global Head of Design AI & Technology at Benoy. 

Grateful. A lot still to do.
